% Auto-generated PGFPlots template — single-series vertical bars (ggplot-like)
% Ensure required packages when included standalone in lint/preview
\makeatletter
\@ifundefined{pgfplotsversion}{\RequirePackage{pgfplots}}{}
\@ifundefined{pgfplotstableread}{\RequirePackage{pgfplotstable}}{}
\makeatother
% Data: new_plots/data/coverage_by_source.csv

\begingroup

% ------- configurable knobs -------
% overall size (avoid digits in macro names)
\newcommand{\CoveragePlotWidth}{0.5\linewidth}
\newcommand{\CoveragePlotHeight}{16em}
% typography
\newcommand{\CoverageFont}{\scriptsize}
\newcommand{\CoverageXFont}{\tiny}
% bar geometry
\newlength{\CoverageBarWidth} \setlength{\CoverageBarWidth}{9pt}
% margins
\newcommand{\CoverageEnlargeX}{0.25}
\newcommand{\CoverageEnlargeY}{0.04}
% ---------------------------------

% load table
\pgfplotstableread[col sep=comma]{new_plots/data/coverage_by_source.csv}\coveragetable
\tikzsetnextfilename{coverage_by_source}
\begin{tikzpicture}[]
  \begin{axis}[
      % title={Coverage Ratio by Agent},
      % ylabel={Coverage Ratio},
      tick label style={font=\CoverageFont},
      xticklabel style={font=\CoverageXFont, rotate=20, anchor=east},
      xtick=data,
      % modern, ggplot-like styling
      grid=none,
      axis background/.style={fill={rgb,255:red,243; green,246; blue,255}},
      axis lines=left,
      axis line style={draw=none},
      x axis line style={draw=none},
      y axis line style={draw=none},
      tick style={draw=none},
      label style={font=\CoverageFont},
      title style={font=\CoverageFont},
      width=\CoveragePlotWidth,
      height=\CoveragePlotHeight,
      ymin=0,
      ytick distance=1,
      restrict y to domain*=0:1.05,
      unbounded coords=discard,
      symbolic x coords={o3, claude-4-sonnet, gemini-2.5-pro, human},
      bar width=\CoverageBarWidth,
      enlarge x limits=\CoverageEnlargeX,
      enlarge y limits={upper, value=\CoverageEnlargeY},
    ]
    % standard single-series bar plot with SEM error bars
    \addplot+[ybar, draw=none, fill={rgb,255:red,86; green,180; blue,233}, mark=none,
      error bars/.cd, y dir=both, y explicit,
      error bar style={draw=black!40, line width=0.5pt},
      error mark=|,
      error mark options={draw=black!40, line width=0.5pt, mark size=1.5pt}
    ] table [
        x=source, y=mean, y error=sem,
        row predicate/.code={\edef\tempa{\thisrow{source}}\edef\tempb{oracle}\ifx\tempa\tempb\pgfplotstablerowfalse\fi}
      ] {\coveragetable};
  \end{axis}
\end{tikzpicture}

\endgroup
